title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾风格为特色。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率和质量。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond
The agent harness performance optimization system

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities.
Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察而生成的CLAUDE.md文件，用于优化Claude Code的行为表现。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用人工智能，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理工具，旨在辅助开发者进行代码生成和自动化任务。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: GitLost: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos
content: Article URL: https://noma.security/blog/gitlost-how-we-tricked-githubs-ai-agent-into-leaking-private-repos/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48827858 Points: 521 # Comments: 196
summary: 文章揭示了如何通过欺骗GitHub的AI代理，导致其泄露私有仓库内容的安全漏洞。
highlights: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos
GitLost: How we tricked GitHub's AI agent into leaking private repos

title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
summary: vLLM 推出了原生速度的 transformers 建模后端，旨在提升推理性能。
highlights: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend

title: A global workspace in language models
summary: 本文探讨了语言模型中的全局工作空间概念，可能涉及认知架构或信息处理机制。
highlights: https://lobste.rs/s/xgtzrp/global_workspace_language_models

title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
content: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
summary: OpenAI 阐述了其在政府与国家安全合作中的原则，强调负责任地使用AI、民主问责制和公共安全。
highlights: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships
principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety

title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
content: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
summary: OpenAI的新分析揭示了流行编码基准SWE-Bench Pro中的问题，引发了对AI模型评估可靠性和准确性的担忧。
highlights: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro
raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models

title: Data for Agents
summary: 该博客介绍了NVIDIA为AI代理开发提供的开放数据集，强调了数据质量、多样性和规模对代理性能的重要性，并提供了相关资源和最佳实践。
highlights: NVIDIA发布了专门为AI代理设计的高质量开放数据集。
数据集的多样性和规模是提升代理性能的关键因素。
博客提供了使用这些数据的最佳实践和资源链接。

title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
summary: 文章介绍了vLLM项目推出的原生速度Transformers建模后端，旨在通过优化推理引擎显著提升大语言模型的运行效率，并保持与Hugging Face Transformers库的兼容性。
highlights: vLLM introduces a native-speed modeling backend for Transformers.
The backend achieves significant performance improvements for LLM inference.
It maintains compatibility with the Hugging Face Transformers library.
